title: Beille 8 Inch Stainless Steel Scissors, Break Apart Kitchen Shears, Grey, 1pc
description:
Upgrade kitchen essentials with these versatile eight inch break away kitchen scissors, designed for performance, convenience and hygiene. Crafted from durable 3mm thick stainless steel, these heavy duty shears deliver reliable cutting power for everyday meal prep and tougher kitchen tasks alike. The innovative break away design allows the scissors to separate into two individual tools, making cleaning easier and more thorough, helping prevent food buildup and maintaining a more sanitary kitchen environment.

Built with practicality in mind, these scissors go beyond simple cutting. The integrated bone notch provides added leverage for cutting through poultry and tougher materials, while the built in bottle opener adds convenience right where you need it. A serrated edge doubles as a fish scaler, making seafood prep faster and more efficient. The ergonomic grey handles offer a comfortable, non slip grip for improved control during use.

Whether you're trimming herbs, cutting proteins, opening bottles or prepping fresh fish, these all in one kitchen scissors are designed to handle it all! A practical, space saving tool that replaces multiple utensils, making it a must have addition to any modern kitchen. Designed for versatility and easy maintenance, they bring efficiency and cleanliness together in one essential kitchen companion.
short_description: Whether you're trimming herbs, cutting proteins, opening bottles or prepping fresh fish, these all in one kitchen scissors are designed to handle it all! A practical, space saving tool that replaces multiple utensils, making it a must have addition to any modern kitchen.
